title: (Archived) Create and Conquer
description: Create & Conquer is a Military and Industrial Addon for the Create Mod by Simibubi focusing on Nuclear Technology, Metallurgy, and enhancement of the base mod.
body:
Create and Conquer is currently a Beta open to testing and feedback.

The full mod will add all sorts of technologies like Tanks, Intercontinental Ballistic Missiles, Nuclear science including Nuclear Warheads, Thermonuclear Warheads, Nuclear Reactors, and much more.
This mod will also add more ways of generating RPM through Nuclear Reactors, Steam Turbines, Antimatter Reactors, and some others.
This mod is not yet complete.
